ground_truth.title: Kitchen appliances - latest news, breaking stories and comment - The Independent
ground_truth.main_content: A curated collection of kitchen appliance reviews, guides, and deals from The Independent's IndyBest section. The page features expert-tested reviews of various kitchen appliances including air fryers, coffee machines, toasters, blenders, dishwashers, slow cookers, ice cream makers, pizza ovens, juicers, stand mixers, and bread makers. Each article provides detailed testing insights, recommendations, and deals information for consumers looking to purchase kitchen appliances.
with: I pitted Hotel Chocolat's £150 viral hot chocolate maker against Salter's £35 appliance
Most portable dishwashers just need a tap and a sink to operate
From bacon to chips, the humble air fryer can do it all
Slow cookers offer a convenient and energy efficient way to whip up meals
Best air fryers for 2025, tried and tested by an expert
